helmet.title: Maximize Your Trading Profits with Up to 90% Rebates | FXPayout
helmet.description: FXPayout is a trusted forex rebate platform providing up to 90% cashback on broker commissions, paid directly to traders.

hero.title: Get Cashback From Every Trading Transaction & <underline>No Additional Fees.</underline>
subtitles: Does Not Access Your Trading Account
runningTexts: Funds Go Directly to the Broker

estimateRebate.title: Rebate Estimation
estimateRebate.subtitle: Select a broker and enter lots per month for a quick estimation
estimateRebate.info: We return up to 90% of the IB commission to traders. The process is fast, secure, and transparent without changing spreads or trading conditions.

problemSection.title: Without Realizing It, Trading Fees Reduce Your Profits
problemSection.paragraph: Every trading transaction comes with costs such as spreads and commissions. Without rebates, these fees will continuously reduce your trading returns.
problems: Trading fees can significantly reduce your profits.
Spreads, commissions, and other fees are often overlooked by traders.
solutions: With rebates, you can recover part of those trading costs.

profile.title: FXPayout Helps You Reduce Trading Costs Through a Rebate (Cashback) System.
profile.paragraph: We work as an Introducing Broker (IB) and share a portion of the broker’s commission with you. No additional fees. No extra risk.
profile.searchPlaceholder: rebate forex, trading cashback, trusted forex IB...

features.title: Up to 90% Rebate
features.paragraph: Get up to 90% cashback from broker commissions directly to your account.

features.title: Focus on traders
features.paragraph: Instant cashback without changing trading conditions.

howItWorks.title: How FXPayout Works in 4 Simple Steps
howItWorks.paragraph: Without changing your strategy, you simply trade as usual. FXPayout takes care of the commission flow into cashback for you.

workflows.title: START
workflows.subtitle: Register via the official FXPayout link
workflows.paragraph: Create an FXPayout account and link your trading account through the official link we provide from your chosen broker.

workflows.title: TRADE
workflows.subtitle: Trade as usual with your broker
workflows.paragraph: Continue your trading activities without changing spreads, leverage, or other conditions. Everything follows the broker's rules.

workflows.title: COMMISSION
workflows.subtitle: Broker sends IB commission to FXPayout
workflows.paragraph: Based on the lot volume you trade, the broker automatically sends the IB commission to FXPayout.

workflows.title: REBATE
workflows.subtitle: Up to 90% rebate to your account
workflows.paragraph: We return up to 90% of that commission as cashback, which can be withdrawn quickly via local banks or e-wallets.

rewards.title: Bonus Rebate +10% for New Accounts
rewards.paragraph: Enjoy a limited-time promo specifically for traders who just joined FXPayout.

securitySection.title: Your Fund Security Is Our Priority

contents.title: FXPayout Is Not a Broker
contents.paragraph: We do not manage your funds. All transactions are carried out directly through the official broker.

contents.title: Does Not Accept Deposits
contents.paragraph: We never ask you to transfer funds. All trading activities remain within your broker account.

contents.title: No Account Access
contents.paragraph: We do not have access to your trading account and do not store your login information.

benefit.title: Maximize Your Trading Profits Without Additional Fees
benefit.paragraph: Get cashback from every trading transaction without changing your broker conditions. A transparent, secure system designed to improve your profit efficiency.

items.title: 💰 Reduce Trading Costs
items.description: A portion of your trading fees is returned to you as cashback.

items.title: 🔄 Rebates Directly from the Broker
items.description: A portion of your trading fees is returned to you as cashback.

items.title: 🚫 No Additional Fees
items.description: No hidden fees or deductions. Everything is fully transparent.

items.title: 🔒 Secure & Transparent System
items.description: All transactions are carried out directly through the broker. We do not access your trading account or store your login information.

items.title: ⚡ Responsive Support
items.description: Our local support team is ready to assist you via WhatsApp and Telegram with fast responses and clear solutions.

reviews.title: What Do Traders Who Use FXPayout Say?
reviews.paragraph: Real experiences from traders earning additional profit from the rebate program.

successResponse.title: Thank You for Sharing Your Experience
successResponse.paragraph: Your review has been successfully submitted and will help other users learn about the experience of using this rebate service.

reviews.emptyReview: No reviews yet. Be the first to share your experience with our services!

modal.title: Write Your Review
modal.paragraph: How satisfied are you with our rebate service?

errors.captcha: Please confirm that you are not a robot

riskSection.title: Trading Risks Still Exist, But Costs Can Be Reduced
riskSection.paragraph: Forex trading carries high risks. However, with FXPayout, you can reduce your trading costs without adding extra risk, since all funds remain safely with your broker.
riskSection.cta: Your Funds Stay Safe with the Broker
